conditionSummary.title: Uterine Fibroids
conditionSummary.explain: Non-cancerous growths in the uterus causing the current heavy, prolonged bleeding episodes.
conditionSummary.hindi: गर्भाशय में रसौली (गांठें), जो भारी रक्तस्राव का कारण बन रही हैं।

conditionSummary.title: Anemia (Low Hemoglobin)
conditionSummary.explain: Hb is currently critically low at 9.4 g/dl due to blood loss. Causes extreme fatigue and fast heart rate (97 bpm).
conditionSummary.hindi: खून की भारी कमी। इससे थकान और दिल की धड़कन तेज हो सकती है।

conditionSummary.title: Nabothian Cysts
conditionSummary.explain: Benign mucous bumps on the cervix. Completely harmless and require no treatment.
conditionSummary.hindi: सामान्य छोटी गांठें, जिनसे कोई खतरा नहीं है।

safetyFirst.title: 🚨 ER Rule: Hemorrhage Risk
safetyFirst.text: If bleeding soaks through more than 1 large pad per hour for 2 consecutive hours, OR if you feel dizzy/faint upon standing, go to the emergency room immediately.

safetyFirst.title: Medication Non-Negotiable
safetyFirst.text: Do NOT miss a dose of Cosklot Plus or Regestrone CR while actively bleeding. These are chemically halting the blood loss.

medications.name: Cosklot Plus (1 BD x 3 days)
medications.purpose: Hemostatic agent to clot blood and stop acute heavy bleeding.

medications.name: Regestrone CR
medications.purpose: Progesterone therapy to thin and stabilize the overgrown uterine lining.

medications.name: Pause 1gm (IV Stat)
medications.purpose: Tranexamic acid given intravenously to rapidly arrest bleeding.

schedule.label: Wake-up & Iron Absorption
schedule.food: 1 glass fresh Amla or Pomegranate juice. The Vitamin C is critical to prepare the stomach to absorb iron today.

schedule.label: Meds & Protein
schedule.food: High protein breakfast (e.g., Besan/Moong Chilla). Take Cosklot Plus immediately after.

schedule.label: Iron-Heavy Meal
schedule.food: Must include dark leafy greens (Spinach/Palak). Strict Rule: No tea or coffee for at least 1 hour after lunch to prevent iron-blocking.

schedule.label: Night Meds
schedule.food: Light dinner. Take evening dose of Cosklot Plus and Regestrone CR.

customModules.title: 🩸 Anemia Rapid Recovery Protocol
customModules.description: Strategies to aggressively rebuild the 9.4 g/dl hemoglobin levels.

items.title: The Vitamin C Multiplier
items.body: Never eat iron-rich foods alone. Always add a squeeze of lemon or eat with a vitamin C fruit (orange/amla). This increases iron absorption by up to 300%.

items.title: The Tannin Blocker
items.body: Tea and coffee contain tannins that completely block the stomach from absorbing iron from food. Keep a 1.5-hour gap between tea and meals.

items.title: Best Iron Snacks
items.body: Roasted chana (chickpeas), pumpkin seeds, and dates. Eat these during the mid-morning or evening hunger gaps.

customModules.title: 🌿 Ayurvedic Fibroid Management
customModules.description: Traditional guidelines to avoid feeding the Kapha-dominant uterine growths.

items.title: Reduce Refined Sugars
items.body: Sugar increases inflammation and insulin, which can trigger hormonal imbalances that feed fibroids.

items.title: Avoid Excess Salt & Pickles
items.body: Salt increases water retention and aggravates the current borderline high blood pressure (139/92).

items.title: Triphala Support
items.body: Mild liver support herbs like Triphala help clear excess estrogen from the bloodstream.

customModules.title: 🏥 Clinical Timeline & Follow-ups
customModules.description: The exact roadmap for managing the fibroids after the acute bleeding stops.
tableRows: Strict bed rest, take Cosklot & Regestrone
Rebuild the depleted red blood cell count.
Assess exact size and location of the fibroids to decide on surgery vs long-term meds.
